Icons

Most DivisiBill pages include a tool bar at the top of the page, typically a colored background with the page title and icons in a contrasting color in the foreground. For example:

The same icons are used on multiple pages. Here is a list of icons you may see (not all are used):

Name Icon
Add َ°گ™
Back َ°پچ
Camera َ°µ‌
Cancel َ°œ؛
Check (approve something) َ°„¬
Close َ°…–
Cloud File َ°…£
Cloud On or Off َ°…£ or َ°…¤
Decrement َ°چ·
Delete َ°©؛
Delete Map Marker َ±‹؛
Download َ°­½
Edit َ±‡¨
Ellipsis َ°‡™
Exit َ°ˆ†
Filter On or Off َ°ˆ³ or َ±“°
Flash On or Off َ°‰پ or َ°‰ƒ
Has Image َ°¥¶
Import َ°‹؛
Increment َ°گ™
List َ°‰¹
Load َ°‹؛
Local File َ°‰– or َ°‰‹
Local Storage On/Off َ°‰– or َ±§¹
Mail َ°‡°
Menu َ°چœ
Null َ°ں¢
OCR َ±„؛
Person Edit َ°؟»
Remote (cloud) File َ°…£ or َ°…ں
Replace َ°¬³
Restore َ°¦›
Save َ° ک
Search Images َ°¥¸
Send Mail َ±ƒ‌
Share َ°پپ
Sort َ°’؛
TOC َ° ¶
Undo َ°•Œ
